lines.chinese: 贾斯珀·怀特有什么问题？
lines.raw: What is Jasper White's problem? | 贾斯珀·怀特有什么问题？

lines.english: Jasper White is one of those rare people who believes in ancient myths.
lines.chinese: 贾斯珀·怀特是那种相信古代神话的稀有人物之一。
lines.raw: Jasper White is one of those rare people who believes in ancient myths. | 贾斯珀·怀特是那种相信古代神话的稀有人物之一。

lines.english: He has just bought a new house in the city, but ever since he moved in, he has had trouble with cars and their owners.
lines.chinese: 他刚在城里买了新房子，但自从他搬进来后，他就一直被汽车和它们的车主所困扰。
lines.raw: He has just bought a new house in the city, but ever since he moved in, he has had trouble with cars and their owners. | 他刚在城里买了新房子，但自从他搬进来后，他就一直被汽车和它们的车主所困扰。

lines.english: When he returns home at night, he always finds that someone has parked a car outside his gate.
lines.chinese: 每当他晚上回家时，他总是发现有人把车停在他家门口。
lines.raw: When he returns home at night, he always finds that someone has parked a car outside his gate. | 每当他晚上回家时，他总是发现有人把车停在他家门口。

lines.english: Because of this, he has not been able to get his own car into his garage even once.
lines.chinese: 因此，他甚至一次都没能把自己的车开进车库。
lines.raw: Because of this, he has not been able to get his own car into his garage even once. | 因此，他甚至一次都没能把自己的车开进车库。

lines.english: Jasper has put up 'No Parking' signs outside his gate, but these have not had any effect.
lines.chinese: 贾斯珀在他家门口竖起了“禁止停车”的牌子，但这些都没有任何效果。
lines.raw: Jasper has put up 'No Parking' signs outside his gate, but these have not had any effect. | 贾斯珀在他家门口竖起了“禁止停车”的牌子，但这些都没有任何效果。

lines.english: Now he has put an ugly stone head over the gate.
lines.chinese: 现在他在门上放了一个丑陋的石头脑袋。
lines.raw: Now he has put an ugly stone head over the gate. | 现在他在门上放了一个丑陋的石头脑袋。

lines.english: It is one of the ugliest faces I have ever seen.
lines.chinese: 这是我见过的最丑陋的脸之一。
lines.raw: It is one of the ugliest faces I have ever seen. | 这是我见过的最丑陋的脸之一。

lines.english: I asked him what it was and he told me that it was Medusa, the Gorgon.
lines.chinese: 我问他那是什么，他告诉我那是美杜莎，那个戈尔贡女妖。
lines.raw: I asked him what it was and he told me that it was Medusa, the Gorgon. | 我问他那是什么，他告诉我那是美杜莎，那个戈尔贡女妖。

lines.english: Jasper hopes that she will turn cars and their owners to stone.
lines.chinese: 贾斯珀希望她能把汽车和它们的车主变成石头。
lines.raw: Jasper hopes that she will turn cars and their owners to stone. | 贾斯珀希望她能把汽车和它们的车主变成石头。

lines.english: But none of them has been turned to stone yet!
lines.chinese: 但他们中还没有人变成石头！
lines.raw: But none of them has been turned to stone yet! | 但他们中还没有人变成石头！
